raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding the handling of a billing dispute by Barclays. 

I made a purchase with XXXX XXXX XXXX in which bonus points were explicitly included as part of the contract. These bonus points were never delivered. 

Because the bonus points were a material part of the agreement, the merchant failed to fulfill the contractual terms. I disputed the charges with Barclays on the basis that services were not delivered as agreed. 

Although I contacted Barclays and requested an investigation, the issue remains unresolved. I am concerned that my dispute is not being properly handled under the Fair Credit Billing Act. 

This complaint is about Barclays ' handling of a billing dispute related to a transaction where contractual obligations were not fulfilled.
